mapper.sql:
select ar.*, su.user_name as approver_name
,pl.title as target_title, pl.plan_type as target_plan_type, pl.priority as target_priority ,su2.user_name as submitter_name from approval_record ar left join sys_user su on ar.approver_id = su.user_id left join plan pl on ar.target_id = pl.id left join sys_user su2 on pl.user_id = su2.user_id
,ach.description as target_title, p2.plan_type as target_plan_type ,su2.user_name as submitter_name from approval_record ar left join sys_user su on ar.approver_id = su.user_id left join achievement ach on ar.target_id = ach.id left join plan p2 on ach.plan_id = p2.id left join sys_user su2 on ach.create_by = su2.login_name
mapper.select: select ar.*, su.user_name as approver_name, p.title as target_title, p.plan_type as target_plan_type, p.priority as target_priority, su2.user_name as submitter_name from approval_record ar left join sys_user su on ar.approver_id = su.user_id left join plan p on ar.target_id = p.id and ar.target_type = 'PLAN' left join sys_user su2 on p.user_id = su2.user_id where ar.approver_id = #{approverId} and ar.action is null and ar.target_type = #{targetType} order by ar.create_time desc

select ar.*, su.user_name as approver_name, p.title as target_title, p.plan_type as target_plan_type, su2.user_name as submitter_name from approval_record ar left join sys_user su on ar.approver_id = su.user_id left join plan p on ar.target_id = p.id and ar.target_type = 'PLAN' left join sys_user su2 on p.user_id = su2.user_id where ar.action is not null and ar.target_type = #{targetType} and ar.action = #{action} order by ar.approved_at desc

select ar.*, su.user_name as approver_name from approval_record ar left join sys_user su on ar.approver_id = su.user_id where ar.target_id = #{targetId} and ar.target_type = #{targetType} order by ar.approval_level, ar.sort_order
select ar.*, su.user_name as approver_name from approval_record ar left join sys_user su on ar.approver_id = su.user_id where ar.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into approval_record (target_id, target_type, approver_id, approval_level, sort_order, create_by, create_time) values (#{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{approverId}, #{approvalLevel}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, sysdate())

insert into approval_record (target_id, target_type, approver_id, approval_level, sort_order, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.targetId}, #{item.targetType}, #{item.approverId}, #{item.approvalLevel}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update approval_record set action = #{action}, comment = #{comment}, approved_at = sysdate() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from approval_record where target_id = #{targetId} and target_type = #{targetType}
